bear_claw_grip.description: Bear claw knife grip demonstration - safe finger positioning for cutting
bear_claw_grip.notes: Source: Good Food. Demonstrates using knuckles as a guide to prevent injury.

basic_cuts.description: Dice, mince, julienne demonstration - fundamental knife cuts every cook needs
basic_cuts.notes: Source: Institute of Culinary Education. Chef James Briscione demonstrates precision dicing and julienne.

reading_the_pan.description: Pan temperature and heat control - water droplet test (Leidenfrost Effect)
reading_the_pan.notes: Explains how water beads act as a physical thermometer for stainless steel pans.

dry_vs_moist_heat.description: Searing vs braising comparison - when to use dry vs moist cooking methods
dry_vs_moist_heat.notes: Covers grilling/roasting (dry) vs. simmering/steaming (moist) and combo techniques like braising.

aromatics_soffritto.description: Cooking aromatics and soffritto base - building flavor foundations
aromatics_soffritto.notes: Tutorial on the 'Holy Trinity' of cooking: onions, carrots, and celery.

seasoning_with_salt.description: Salting and seasoning technique - layering salt throughout cooking process
seasoning_with_salt.notes: Focuses on the science of how salt penetrates food at different stages.

acid_balance.description: Using acid to balance flavor - lemon juice and vinegar brightening dishes
acid_balance.notes: Explains the 3:1 ratio and how acid 'cuts' through heavy fats.

searing_meat.description: Getting a proper sear on protein - achieving Maillard reaction golden crust
searing_meat.notes: Deep dive into the Maillard reaction and heat management for crust development.

knowing_doneness.description: Testing protein for doneness - touch test vs thermometer readings
knowing_doneness.notes: Demonstrates the palm/finger touch test for rare, medium, and well-done.

pan_sauce_fundamentals.description: Building a pan sauce from fond - deglazing and scraping
pan_sauce_fundamentals.notes: Source: Martha Stewart. Explains how to use wine or stock to lift 'fond' from the pan.

emulsification_basics.description: Emulsification and sauce technique - Monte au Beurre
emulsification_basics.notes: Explains why cold butter is crucial for creating a stable, glossy emulsion.

mise_en_place.description: Mise en place preparation method - organizing ingredients before cooking
mise_en_place.notes: Culinary school approach to kitchen efficiency and setup.
